stemHtml: Under normal pneumatic system operating conditions, what function is performed by the APU BLEED switch?

options.a: It supplies bleed air from the APU to the pneumatic system when selected ON.
options.b: It automatically transfers bleed air control to the engine when thrust increases.
options.c: It isolates the APU from the pneumatic manifold regardless of switch position.
options.d: It controls the APU fuel flow during high bleed-air demand.
